mod-setting-description.inventory-repair-interval:
How often to perform repairs, in ticks. The amount repaired per interval is adjusted so overall rate is unchanged. Smaller values may impact performace.

[color=blue]Default:[/color] __1__
[color=blue]Minimum:[/color] __2__
mod-setting-description.inventory-repair-order: Whether to select the fastest or slowest repair pack. Infinite-durability tools with the fastest speed are still selected first regardless of setting.
